title: Integration with monday and google voice
excerpt: I am considering moving from Hubspot to monday and Lillian recommended I post this question here. Hubspot works pretty well, but the built in dialer 1) doesn’t include SMS like some other dialers, and 2) is not linked to…

posts.author: realmonday (Rick Helvey)
posts.cookedHtml: I am considering moving from Hubspot to monday and Lillian recommended I post this question here. Hubspot works pretty well, but the built in dialer 1) doesn’t include SMS like some other dialers, and 2) is not linked to my work phone/google voice. Lilian said I can usee a Zap to do this, I want to ee if anyone else is doing this successfully. Being able to put those in place with the functionality of monday would help me make the decision to move over. Thoughts?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rick,

I’ve had a little investigation - we don’t currently have a native integration with Google Voice and I can’t seem to find a confirmation external integration with Google voice.

I encourage you to add your vote to this feature request → Google Voice Integration? - #4 by JungleJamJohn

I will also share this feedback with our team internally so they’re aware of the demand for it!

posts.author: MagdalenaBachinger (Magdalena Bachinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently considering building an integration for Google Voice. Since Google does not have an API for it and doesn’t offer any other integrations (e.g., Make, Zapier), we are thinking of creating a workaround.

We are very interested in understanding the specific problems you encounter in your workflows so we can address them effectively.

Please reach out to magdalena.bachinger@cdtm.de. I would be happy to schedule a quick call with you.
